variants.title: HiFi Filter OT 2054 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 59470
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OT 2054 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO 59470. Easy to install and replace, the OT 2054 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
